compiled_state.title: #2 Step 3: wire public reads behind REBAR_NATIVE_READS kill-switch
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Point show_ticket/list_tickets/deps/ready/search at _reads; fall back to _json(_run(...)) when REBAR_NATIVE_READS=0, read PER-CALL (so a long-lived rebar-mcp process is toggleable). Map in-process exceptions to existing RebarError/ConcurrencyError shapes. MCP reads delegate to these library fns, so MCP speeds up for free. AC: kill-switch toggles path at runtime; parity tests green both ways.

comments.body: Done: __init__._native_reads_enabled() per-call gate; REBAR_NATIVE_READS=0 falls back to subprocess. MCP reads delegate to these. Commit 7d53bc5.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
